## Web-Mobile Parity

Required for PRs that touch web business logic.

- Impact: No impact | Impact
- Mobile status: Updated in same PR | Tracked separately
- Mobile files changed:
- Validation: mobile type-check/test summary

If "Tracked separately" is selected, provide all below:

- Follow-up task ID/link:
- Owner:
- Due date:
- Reason same-PR update is not possible:

## Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed web-mobile parity impact.
- [ ] If impacted, mobile parity changes are included or explicitly tracked.
- [ ] I updated docs if logic or behavior changed.
